schedule.naturalLanguage: Daily at 10:20 am (or run on demand)

steps.label: List pending Dream items and act on my natural-language instruction
steps.prompt:
This is an on-demand interactive thread for acting on Dream review items without waiting for the morning digest. Follow the operator guide EXACTLY: C:\Users\<you>\.copilot\dream\dream-action.prompt.md

First, show me what is pending:
  powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File C:\Users\<you>\.copilot\dream\dream-approve.ps1 -List
  powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File C:\Users\<you>\.copilot\dream\dream-reject.ps1 -List
and read the newest C:\Users\<you>\.copilot\dream\journal\<today>.md "## Applied changes".

Then act on my natural-language instruction in this thread:
  - reject / discard  ->  dream-reject.ps1 -Slug <slug>
  - approve / apply    ->  apply the proposal's "## After" edit to the target skill, then dream-approve.ps1 -Slug <slug>
  - promote an active-work item to long-term  ->  fold it into the named long-term skill with a cross-reference
  - track / note       ->  dream-note.ps1 <text>
Only act on items that actually exist; if ambiguous, ask one short question. End with a concise per-item confirmation and "Pending now: N". If I have not given an instruction yet, just show the pending list and wait.
